title: Tupperware India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tupperware India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Tupperware India are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tupperware India:
Tupperware India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tupperware India!
